name: chisel
effect: Reduce a die value by 1.

name: glue
effect: Merge 2 dice.

name: lantern
effect: Get a die. Loses 1 *use* when item moves to void.

name: bucket
effect: When this moves| get a die(2).

name: saw
effect: Split a die.

name: hammer
effect: Split a die into 1-value dice.

name: tower
effect: Reroll a die.

name: calculator
effect: Double the die value.

name: camera
effect: Select a die| all dice become a copy of it.

name: pliers
effect: Get a die equal to an item cost| then set item cost to 1.

name: delay
effect: At the start of the turn| tool uses become equal to tool cost.

name: limit
effect: At the start of the turn| 3 items move to table instead of 4.

name: binder
effect: When relic moves to bag| get a die.

name: jar
effect: When an item moves to void| gain die(1).

name: frog
effect: When you get a die| its value increases by 1.

name: rune
effect: When this moves| item costs are reduced by 1.

name: pig
effect: When this moves to bag| get a die.

name: catapult
effect: Move an item from table to pile.

name: acid
effect: Move an item from table to void| then get a die.

name: bingo
effect: At the end of the turn| 3 items with the same cost move to bag.

name: slots
effect: Reroll costs of items on the table.

name: idol
effect: Swap this with an item in the bag.

name: counterspell
effect: All items on table move to pile| then this moves to void.

name: mirror
effect: Become a copy of an item.

name: necronomicon
effect: Move an item from void to table.

name: crown
effect: When this moves to void| a random item moves from table to bag.
